series_metadata.series_description: Claim files containing medical records, correspondence, claim applications and authorizations.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: For "lost time" and/or "medical only" claims prior to August 25, 2006 shall be disposed of ten (10) years from the date of last activity. For "lost time" and/or "medical only" claims after August 25, 2006 should be deleted/destroyed five (5) years from the date of last activity. ; Paper: For "lost time" and/or "medical only" claims prior to August 25, 2006 shall be disposed of ten (10) years from the date of last activity. For "lost time" and/or "medical only" claims after August 25, 2006 should be deleted/destroyed five (5) years from the date of last activity., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
